CustomField.description:
old formula:
IF(DX_CR_Status__c ="","0-None", IF(DX_CR_Status__c = "Requirements Gathering","1-Requirements Gathering", IF(DX_CR_Status__c = "Pending Customer Approval","2-Pending Customer Approval", IF(DX_CR_Status__c="Customer Approves Requirements","3-Customer Approves Requirements", IF(DX_CR_Status__c = "Ready to Assign to Engineer","4-Ready to Assign to Engineer", IF(DX_CR_Status__c ="In Progress with Engineer","5-In Progress with Engineer", IF(DX_CR_Status__c="Pending Deployment (Turku DSS)","6-Pending Deployment (Turku DSS)", IF(DX_CR_Status__c = "Customer Validating","7-Customer Validating", IF(DX_CR_Status__c = "Go-Live (Akron DSS)","8-Go-Live (Akron DSS)", "9-Customer Acceptance Received")))))))))
CustomField.formula: IF(DX_CR_Status__c = "None","0-None", IF(DX_CR_Status__c = "Requirements Gathering","1-Requirements Gathering", IF(DX_CR_Status__c = "Pending Customer Approval","2-Pending Customer Approval", IF(DX_CR_Status__c="Customer Approves Requirements","3-Customer Approves Requirements", IF(DX_CR_Status__c = "Ready to Assign to Engineer","4-Ready to Assign to Engineer", IF(DX_CR_Status__c ="In Progress with Engineer","5-In Progress with Engineer", IF(DX_CR_Status__c= "Pending Deployment (Turku DSS)","6-Pending Deployment (Turku DSS)", IF(DX_CR_Status__c = "Customer Validating","7-Customer Validating", IF(DX_CR_Status__c = "Go-Live (Akron DSS)","8-Go-Live (Akron DSS)", IF(DX_CR_Status__c = "Customer Acceptance Received", "9-Customer Acceptance Received",""))))))))))
CustomField.label: Calc CR Status
